ops.text: B0 TINKER PILOT: PASS (phase tinker_pilot marked; cells tinker_pilot_qwen35_4b + tinker_pilot_run journaled to EXP E8-generation). Adopted: Tinker + Qwen/Qwen3-8B for E8 cells b/c/d — 300-step LoRA (rank16 lr1e-4 seed1729 no-unembed) cost $0.74/23min; PEFT->mlx-lm converter maps all 7 modules dropped=[]; served on mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit local sentinel AUC 0.9063 vs Tinker-sampler 0.9074 (drift 0.001) vs local E8 Qwen3-4B baseline 0.816@500. REJECTED: Qwen3.5-4B (training PASS AUC 0.902/$2.14 but linear-attn split in_proj_q/k/v cannot load into mlx-lm fused in_proj_qkv — local serve needs merge+requantize); first 8B run with default train_unembed=True journaled FAIL on the strict dropped==[] gate (trained-vs-served skew) and rerun clean. GOTCHAS: Tinker docs model lineup lists Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 but live get_server_capabilities does NOT; tinker-cookbook pins transformers<=5.5.4 (collides with mlx-lm 0.31.3's >=5.12) so we use the raw SDK + local tokenizer. Total pilot spend ~$4.4 of $60 cap. Credentials: 1Password item TINKER_API_KEY -> ~/.cc-steer/tinker.env.
